company.name: Zion Tech Group
company.tagline: Innovative IT, AI, and Micro-SaaS Solutions

contact.address: 364 E Main St STE 1008 Middletown DE 19709

company.description: Zion Tech Group provides cutting-edge technology solutions including AI-powered services, IT consulting, and custom Micro-SaaS products designed to help businesses thrive in the digital age.

services.name: Free CDN Services
services.description: Leverage free Content Delivery Network tiers from Cloudflare, Vercel, and Netlify to accelerate your website globally with SSL, DDoS protection, and caching.
services.pricing: Free tier available (paid plans for advanced features)
services.ideal_for: Blogs, small business websites, personal portfolios, startups

services.name: 5G Mobile Applications
services.description: Develop high-performance mobile applications that leverage 5G connectivity for ultra-low latency, enhanced AR/VR experiences, and real-time data processing.
services.ideal_for: IoT applications, gaming, telemedicine, autonomous vehicles, industrial automation

services.name: AI Customer Insights
services.description: Transform customer data into actionable insights using machine learning algorithms that predict behavior, identify trends, and recommend personalized engagement strategies.
services.pricing: Starting at $1,000/month for analysis of up to 100k customers
services.ideal_for: E-commerce, SaaS companies, subscription services, retail chains

services.name: AI Invoice Processing
services.description: Automate invoice processing with AI-powered data extraction, validation, and accounting system integration. Reduces manual work by 80%+.
services.ideal_for: Small to medium businesses, accounting firms, freelancers

services.name: AI Chronic Disease Tracker
services.description: Monitor and predict chronic disease progression using wearable device data and machine learning to provide early warnings and personalized health recommendations.
services.pricing: Custom pricing based on patient volume
services.ideal_for: Healthcare providers, insurance companies, wellness programs
